title: How to get count of all the subitems of the board
excerpt: I have more than 6000 subitems on my monday.com board. How can I fetch the count of subitems in a one go using query.

posts.author: Shreyas13398 (Shreyas)
posts.cookedHtml: I have more than 6000 subitems on my monday.com board. How can I fetch the count of subitems in a one go using query.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Shreyas13398,

You can get the count by running this query:

{
  boards(ids: SUBITEM_BOARD_ID) {
    items_count
  }
}
